hero.headline: Your Trusted Independent Insurance Broker
hero.subline: We shop 30+ carriers to find you the best rate for auto, home, business, and specialty coverage.

insuranceLines.headline: We Cover Everything
insuranceLines.subline: Personal, business, and specialty coverage under one roof.

whyIndependent.headline: Why Choose an Independent Broker?
whyIndependent.subline: Unlike captive agents who represent one company, we work for you.

points.title: We Shop 30+ Carriers
points.description: We compare rates from over 30 insurance companies to find you the best coverage at the lowest price.

points.title: We Work for You
points.description: Our loyalty is to you, not to any single insurance company. We give unbiased advice based on your needs.

points.title: One Broker for All Your Needs
points.description: Auto, home, business, specialty — one call and one trusted relationship handles everything.

carriers.headline: Carriers We Work With
carriers.subline: We shop them all to get you the best rate

howItWorks.headline: How It Works — 3 Simple Steps
howItWorks.subline: Getting your best insurance rate has never been easier.

steps.title: Tell Us What You Need
steps.description: Fill out our quick quote form or give us a call. Takes less than 2 minutes.

steps.title: We Shop 30+ Carriers
steps.description: Our licensed brokers compare rates from over 30 insurance companies on your behalf.

steps.title: You Choose the Best Rate
steps.description: We present your options clearly. You pick the coverage that fits your needs and budget.

cta.headline: Ready to Save on Insurance?
cta.subline: Get a free quote in minutes. We'll shop 30+ carriers to find your best rate.
cta.note: Quote within 2 hours during business hours
